message:
Continue parser refactoring - extract expressions and postfix modules

Reduces parser.zig from 1,289 to 645 lines by extracting expression and postfix parsing.

Created src/parser/expressions.zig (335 lines):
- parseOrExpr, parseAndExpr, parseNotExpr
- parseComparison - ==, !=, <, >, <=, >=, in, not in
- parseBitOr, parseBitXor, parseBitAnd - bitwise operators
- parseAddSub, parseMulDiv - arithmetic operators
- parsePower - exponentiation

Created src/parser/postfix.zig (342 lines):
- parsePostfix - function calls, subscripts, attributes
- parseCall - function call arguments
- parsePrimary - literals, identifiers, tuples, unary ops

Made additional parser helpers public:
- peek(), advance()

Parser refactoring status:
- ✅ literals.zig (123 lines)
- ✅ expressions.zig (335 lines)
- ✅ postfix.zig (342 lines)
- ⏳ statements.zig (next)
- parser.zig: 1,402 → 645 lines (-757 lines, 54% reduction)
